title: The Last Human CEO
logline: The last human CEO in the Fortune 100, a privileged fourth-generation heir, descends into mania as an unkillably ethical AI is installed to replace him -- and routine due diligence surfaces the buried thing that proves the machine was right about him all along.
genre: literary tragic dark comedy / near-future corporate satire
source: Grounded in the 'Last Human CEO' essay series (Parts 1-3), Spaceship Alpha 9.
current_focus: ch_01 drafted; remaining foundation polish + Act 1 drafting
